title: Parker Increases Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: CLEVELAND, April 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.48 per share of common stock to shareholders of record as of May 12, 2023. The dividend is payable June 2, 2023. The dividend represents an 11% increase over the previous quarterly cash dividend of $1.33 per common share and is the company's 292ndconsecutive quarterly dividend.

title: Parker to Announce Fiscal 2023 Third Quarter Earnings on May 4th; Conference Call and Webcast Scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern
text: CLEVELAND, April 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it will release its fiscal 2023 third quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, May 4, 2023, followed by a conference call at 11:00 a.m., Eastern time. During the call, the company will discuss fiscal 2023 third quarter results and respond to questions from institutional investors and security analysts. The conference call will be webcast simultaneously on Parker's investor information website at  www.phstock.com  with an accompanying slide presentation. The webcast will be archived on the site and available for replay later that day.
